description: Case style: Analogue watch in a stainless steel square case, rotating bezel with markingsDial style: Black dial, has white markings with steel toned accents, white and black hands, red and white markings along the rim, branding near the 12 hour markFeatures: Screw to reset timeStrap style: Black genuine leather strap with stitched detail and a tang clasp closureWater resistance: Up to 30 mWarranty: One year against manufacturing defects
